evalAfter: (async()=>{[...document.body.children].forEach(el=>{const cs=getComputedStyle(el);if(cs.position==='fixed'&&parseInt(cs.zIndex||0)>40)el.remove()});document.body.classList.remove('da-blocked');const item=[...document.querySelectorAll('nav a,nav button,aside a,aside li,[onclick]')].find(x=>/Zona/.test(x.textContent||'')&&(x.textContent||'').trim().length<8);if(item)item.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,900));const sel=document.getElementById('zonaSelector');if(sel&&!sel.options.length)sel.innerHTML='<option>ALMACEN</option><option>ZONA-01</option><option>ZONA-02</option>';['zonaBtnSorpresas','zonaBtnMermas','zonaBtnVenc','zonaBtnLogErrores'].forEach(id=>{const b=document.getElementById(id);if(b)b.classList.remove('hidden')});const bg=document.getElementById('zonaBtnGuias');if(bg)bg.classList.add('hidden');const vb=document.getElementById('zonaVencBadge');if(vb){vb.textContent='5';vb.style.display=''}const mb=document.getElementById('zonaMermasBadge');if(mb){mb.textContent='2';mb.style.display=''}const fl=document.getElementById('zonaFreshLbl');if(fl)fl.textContent='actualizado recién';window.scrollTo(0,0);await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,400));const zv=document.getElementById('view-zona');return {zonaVisible:zv&&getComputedStyle(zv).display!=='none'};})()
